# Wuci-Ji

Site: https://nosuchmachine.net/
Repository: https://github.com/chasebryan/-wuci-ji
WuciOS v2.4: https://nosuchmachine.net/wucios.html

Current public focus:
WuciOS v2.4 Reduction Gate.

WuciOS v2.4 is a reduction-controlled, evidence-bound operating environment
organized around Noether Core, Birkhoff Bastion, Tarski Review Appliance, and
Euclid Substrate Trial.

Current status:

- local evidence only
- no substrate selected
- Void is one candidate only
- Noether Core is GUI-free
- Birkhoff Bastion is optional
- Tarski Review Appliance generates the review packet
- Phase 2B expands safe build feasibility probes to Buildroot, Alpine, Debian minimal, Void, NixOS, Guix, Yocto, and OpenBSD reference
- Phase 3A defines controlled build rooms and backend readiness without executing builds
- Phase 3B readiness reports backend, input, policy, and resource blockers without executing build rooms
- Phase 3C-A verifies rootless backend smoke guardrails with a synthetic non-substrate image
- Phase 3C-A does not select a substrate, rank candidates, or generate a numeric WuciOS score
- Phase 3C-B defines direct-rootfs preparation policy for Buildroot, Alpine, Debian minimal, and Void
- Phase 3C-B does not generate rootfs images, attempt substrate artifacts, select a substrate, rank candidates, or generate a numeric WuciOS score
- Phase 3C-B is integrated and closed at 9be4dcc
- Phase 3C-C is the active authorized preparation phase for NixOS and Guix store-root policy only
- Phase 3C-C does not build or run NixOS or Guix, realize store paths, generate artifacts, generate artifact hashes, select a substrate, rank candidates, or generate a numeric WuciOS score
- Yocto remains deferred to Phase 3C-D and OpenBSD reference remains deferred to Phase 3C-E
- missing measurements are NOT_MEASURED

Validation handles:

- make wucios-validate
- make wucios-fluff-audit
- make wucios-substrate-matrix
- make wucios-euclid-buildrooms-phase-3a
- make wucios-euclid-buildrooms-phase-3b-readiness
- make wucios-euclid-buildrooms-phase-3c-a
- make wucios-euclid-direct-rootfs-phase-3c-b
- make wucios-euclid-store-root-phase-3c-c
- make wucios-review
- make site-validate

Non-claims:

- not production cryptography
- not runtime sandboxing
- not host-cleanliness proof
- not whole-system post-quantum safety
- not FIPS validation
- not government validation
- not external certification
- not independent audit completion
- not production authority
